test_groups.title: Default options
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior with no options provided, focusing on valid currency formats and common edge cases.

test_groups.title: Require symbol
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that the currency symbol is required when the `require_symbol` option is set.

test_groups.title: Allow negatives
test_groups.rationale: Tests the handling of negative values when `allow_negatives` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Require decimal
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that a decimal portion is required when `require_decimal` is set.

test_groups.title: Custom decimal separator
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when a custom decimal separator is used.

test_groups.title: Custom thousands separator
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when a custom thousands separator is used.

test_groups.title: Symbol after digits
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the currency symbol appears after the digits when `symbol_after_digits` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Allow space after symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when spaces are allowed after the currency symbol.

test_groups.title: Allow space after digits
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when spaces are allowed after the digits.

test_groups.title: Custom digits after decimal
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the correct number of digits after the decimal when `digits_after_decimal` is customized.
